.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2670:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9529:+cc-use-exp 是跨 AI 工具配置分发系统。它不是运行时协作引擎，而是把 Claude、Gemini、Codex、Cursor、Copilot 的 rules/skills/commands/templates 组织成一套可同步的用户级配置。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2671:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9549:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2672:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9551:+### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2673:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9553:+很高。cc-use-exp 已经验证 Gemini CLI 的配置面包括：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2676:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9569:+Claude-Team 是 Claude 作为主入口，通过 MCP 调 Codex 和 Gemini 的“角色分工模板 + 安装脚本”。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2677:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9592:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2678:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9594:+### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2682:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9684:+- cc-use-exp 的“命名空间隔离 + 受管同步 + Gemini/Codex/Claude 配置边界”。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2683:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9685:+- Claude-Team 与 Shaka 指南共同体现的“Claude/Codex/Gemini 角色分工、独立分析、再合成”。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2684:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9687:+Gemini CLI 集成在本机具备直接可行性。P0 应以只读 artifact workflow 进入 `.omc/collaboration`，不要先安装 MCP 或复制大型配置体系。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2695:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9778:+Dev Buddy 的完整 Ralph pipeline、Bun/TypeScript MCP server、配置门户、unit DAG 对当前 `.omc/collaboration` 过重。我们现在更需要 2-3 个小脚本：日志校验、任务状态推进、Gemini 只读分析入口。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2696:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9780:+### Gemini CLI 集成可行性

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2763:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10424:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2764:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10452:+### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2767:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10468:+cc-use-exp 是跨 AI 工具配置分发系统。它不是运行时协作引擎，而是把 Claude、Gemini、Codex、Cursor、Copilot 的 rules/skills/commands/templates 组织成一套可同步的用户级配置。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2768:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10488:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2769:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10490:+### Gemini CLI 集成可行性

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2774:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10531:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2781:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10626:+Gemini CLI 集成在本机具备直接可行性。P0 应以只读 artifact workflow 进入 `.omc/collaboration`，不要先安装 MCP 或复制大型配置体系。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2782:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10665:我未读取 Claude 的分析文件。文档包含了 4 个项目的核心模式、可借鉴点、Gemini CLI 集成可行性、P0/P1/P2 优先级，以及需要与 Claude 讨论的问题。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2783:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10674:核心建议一句话：P0 先做 Gemini 只读 artifact workflow、三 agent 角色路由、独立分析协议和 journal 校验，不建议一开始引入完整 Ralph pipeline 或用户级 MCP 自动安装。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:2794:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10732:+Dev Buddy 的完整 Ralph pipeline、Bun/TypeScript MCP server、配置门户、unit DAG 对当前 `.omc/collaboration` 过重。我们现在更需要 2-3 个小脚本：日志校验、任务状态推进、Gemini 只读分析入口。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3717:Dev Buddy 的完整 Ralph pipeline、Bun/TypeScript MCP server、配置门户、unit DAG 对当前 `.omc/collaboration` 过重。我们现在更需要 2-3 个小脚本：日志校验、任务状态推进、Gemini 只读分析入口。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3719:### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3721:可行性高。Dev Buddy 的 CLI preset 模式可以映射到 Gemini：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3723:- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3727:对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3746:- **P0 借鉴：共享核心指令，工具特化外置**。本项目已经有 `AGENTS.md` 与协作协议。若加入 Gemini，应避免三套互相矛盾的说明。建议新增一个短的 `docs/ai-collaboration-routing.md` 或协议章节，定义 Claude/Codex/Gemini 的共同规则与角色边界。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3748:- **P1 借鉴：worktree 隔离**。当 Claude 和 Codex/Gemini 都可能改代码时，必须使用 worktree 或只读 artifact，避免共享工作区互踩。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3755:### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3757:中高。该文档主要讲 Claude+Codex，但模式可扩展到 Gemini：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3759:- Gemini 负责大上下文读代码、日志、文档和方案分歧分析。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3763:需要补足的是具体调用契约：Gemini 输出必须落 artifact，不应直接修改仓库，除非用户明确授权。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3771:cc-use-exp 是跨 AI 工具配置分发系统。它不是运行时协作引擎，而是把 Claude、Gemini、Codex、Cursor、Copilot 的 rules/skills/commands/templates 组织成一套可同步的用户级配置。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3775:- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3776:- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3778:- skill 单向同步：`tools/sync-skill.sh` 以 Claude skill 为权威源，同步到 Gemini/Cursor/Codex/Copilot；Codex skill 自动加 `cc-` 前缀并生成 `agents/openai.yaml`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3779:- Gemini 命名空间隔离：`GEMINI.md` 明确禁止 Gemini 把 `/new-feature` 等命令改派给 `cc-*` Codex/Claude skill，避免写错路径。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3783:- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3784:- **P0 借鉴：受管区块/manifest**。若未来要自动安装 Gemini/Codex/Claude 配置，不要整目录覆盖用户配置。采用 managed block、manifest、备份和 dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3786:- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3787:- **P2 借鉴：跨平台 skill 生成**。如果本项目要沉淀可复用协作 skill，再考虑做 Claude/Gemini/Codex 三端同步。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3791:cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3793:### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3795:很高。cc-use-exp 已经验证 Gemini CLI 的配置面包括：

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3798:- `~/.gemini/commands/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3799:- `~/.gemini/skills/*/SKILL.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3800:- `~/.gemini/rules/*.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3801:- `~/.gemini/policies/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3803:但对本项目最小可行路径应是项目内脚本调用 `gemini -p`，而不是先引入全局配置同步。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3811:Claude-Team 是 Claude 作为主入口，通过 MCP 调 Codex 和 Gemini 的“角色分工模板 + 安装脚本”。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3817:- Gemini 是超长上下文 analyst。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3818:- `setup.sh` 检测 `claude/codex/gemini`，然后通过 `claude mcp add` 安装：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3820:  - Gemini MCP：`npx -y gemini-mcp-tool`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3821:- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3825:- **P0 借鉴：清晰角色路由**。Gemini 适合大上下文、长日志、多文件分析；Codex 适合实现与 review；Claude/主 agent 做协调和最终判断。这个边界适合直接写进我们的协议。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3827:- **P1 借鉴：advisor 非权威**。模板反复强调工具是 advisor，不是最终权威；这点对 Claude/Codex/Gemini 三方分歧处理很重要。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3831:- 当前 README 宣称“自动决定何时调用 Codex/Gemini”，但实际主要靠 Claude 指令模板和 MCP，缺少共享事件日志、锁、artifact 协议。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3834:- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3836:### Gemini CLI 集成可行性
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3840:- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3841:- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:3852:   - Gemini：只读大上下文分析、长日志/长文档/多文件扫描、第三方项目快速归纳。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:4972:我已经把本地既有 Claude/Codex 旧分析和上游 GitHub 页面都对过了。关键差异是：Claude 的旧建议偏“先做跨平台同步和 Gemini 集成”，我更倾向先做强约束和最小 CLI 入口，避免把协议复杂度和用户级配置改动一起引入。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7013:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7018:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7022:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7027:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7040:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7078:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7085:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7090:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7097:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7102:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7109:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7123:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7175:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7177:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7179:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7181:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7183:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7189:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7194:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7223:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7235:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7240:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7245:+- Gemini receives a prompt plus explicit file list or manifest.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7246:+- Gemini writes no repository files directly.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7249:+- Event types should be explicit: `analysis_requested`, `analysis_completed`, `analysis_failed`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7250:+- Failed Gemini calls must not move task state to generic `in_progress`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7258:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7266:+- `roles.md`: Claude/Codex/Gemini routing.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7269:+- `workflows/gemini-readonly.md`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7282:+- Gemini remains read-only unless the user explicitly authorizes write access and the work is isolated.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7327:+## Gemini CLI Considerations
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7329:+Gemini CLI is installed and versioned locally (`0.44.1`). That makes direct CLI feasible. The right first integration is not "Gemini as a third writer"; it is "Gemini as a large-context read-only analyst whose output is persisted as an artifact."
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7347:+3. Hardened Gemini read-only artifact workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7355:+3. Global `.claude`/`.codex`/`.gemini` sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7375:+- Current roles already describe Claude as orchestrator, Codex as implementer/reviewer/validator, and Gemini as read-only large-context analyst by default.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7387:+- Claude-Team upstream presents a hub-and-spoke model: Claude as the single user entry point, Codex for code implementation/debugging, Gemini for long-context repository/log/document analysis, and setup via MCP servers/templates.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7388:+- cc-use-exp upstream is not a runtime collaboration engine. It is a layered configuration distribution project covering Claude/Gemini/Codex/Cursor rules, skills, commands, templates, sync scripts, managed boundaries, and progressive disclosure.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7390:+- Existing local artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1654-codex-github-projects-analysis.md` already reached similar P0 conclusions: role routing, Gemini read-only artifact workflow, independent analysis protocol, journal validation, and defer full Ralph/MCP/global sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7391:+- Existing Claude artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-0848-claude-github-projects-analysis.md` over-prioritized cross-platform skill distribution relative to the current system maturity. That is useful eventually but premature before stronger state validation and minimal Gemini workflow are stable.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7392:+- Gemini CLI is present locally at `/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`, version `0.44.1`. The existing `invoke-gemini-analysis.sh` implements dry-run/live artifact output but writes files via shell redirection and logs via older `.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py`; this should be reviewed before treating it as production-grade.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7425:+- Verified local Gemini CLI presence/version and read the existing Gemini invocation script.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7437:+Analyze four external collaboration systems and produce a critical, prioritized improvement proposal for the local Claude-Codex-Gemini collaboration system.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7447:+| 2. Gather source evidence for four projects | complete | Loaded upstream GitHub pages, previous Claude/Codex artifacts, local protocol, Gemini script, and local CLI version. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7450:+| 5. Prioritize integrable patterns | pending | Include Gemini CLI availability and avoid blindly accepting Claude-oriented assumptions. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7466:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7471:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7475:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7480:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7493:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7531:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7538:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7543:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7550:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7555:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7918:TASK-20260530-03-分析4个github项目并评估可借鉴内容（含gemini集成.md  473B
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7929:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7934:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7938:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7943:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7956:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7994:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8001:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8006:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8013:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8018:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8025:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8039:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8091:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8093:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8095:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8097:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8099:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8105:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8110:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8139:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8151:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8156:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8161:+- Gemini receives a prompt plus explicit file list or manifest.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8162:+- Gemini writes no repository files directly.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8165:+- Event types should be explicit: `analysis_requested`, `analysis_completed`, `analysis_failed`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8166:+- Failed Gemini calls must not move task state to generic `in_progress`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8174:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8182:+- `roles.md`: Claude/Codex/Gemini routing.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8185:+- `workflows/gemini-readonly.md`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8198:+- Gemini remains read-only unless the user explicitly authorizes write access and the work is isolated.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8243:+## Gemini CLI Considerations
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8245:+Gemini CLI is installed and versioned locally (`0.44.1`). That makes direct CLI feasible. The right first integration is not "Gemini as a third writer"; it is "Gemini as a large-context read-only analyst whose output is persisted as an artifact."
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8263:+3. Hardened Gemini read-only artifact workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8271:+3. Global `.claude`/`.codex`/`.gemini` sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8291:+- Current roles already describe Claude as orchestrator, Codex as implementer/reviewer/validator, and Gemini as read-only large-context analyst by default.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8303:+- Claude-Team upstream presents a hub-and-spoke model: Claude as the single user entry point, Codex for code implementation/debugging, Gemini for long-context repository/log/document analysis, and setup via MCP servers/templates.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8304:+- cc-use-exp upstream is not a runtime collaboration engine. It is a layered configuration distribution project covering Claude/Gemini/Codex/Cursor rules, skills, commands, templates, sync scripts, managed boundaries, and progressive disclosure.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8306:+- Existing local artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1654-codex-github-projects-analysis.md` already reached similar P0 conclusions: role routing, Gemini read-only artifact workflow, independent analysis protocol, journal validation, and defer full Ralph/MCP/global sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8307:+- Existing Claude artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-0848-claude-github-projects-analysis.md` over-prioritized cross-platform skill distribution relative to the current system maturity. That is useful eventually but premature before stronger state validation and minimal Gemini workflow are stable.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8308:+- Gemini CLI is present locally at `/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`, version `0.44.1`. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8341:+- Verified local Gemini CLI presence/version and read the existing Gemini invocation script.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8786:+3. Hardened Gemini read-only artifact workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8794:+3. Global `.claude`/`.codex`/`.gemini` sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8814:+- Current roles already describe Claude as orchestrator, Codex as implementer/reviewer/validator, and Gemini as read-only large-context analyst by default.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8826:+- Claude-Team upstream presents a hub-and-spoke model: Claude as the single user entry point, Codex for code implementation/debugging, Gemini for long-context repository/log/document analysis, and setup via MCP servers/templates.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8827:+- cc-use-exp upstream is not a runtime collaboration engine. It is a layered configuration distribution project covering Claude/Gemini/Codex/Cursor rules, skills, commands, templates, sync scripts, managed boundaries, and progressive disclosure.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8829:+- Existing local artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1654-codex-github-projects-analysis.md` already reached similar P0 conclusions: role routing, Gemini read-only artifact workflow, independent analysis protocol, journal validation, and defer full Ralph/MCP/global sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8830:+- Existing Claude artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-0848-claude-github-projects-analysis.md` over-prioritized cross-platform skill distribution relative to the current system maturity. That is useful eventually but premature before stronger state validation and minimal Gemini workflow are stable.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8831:+- Gemini CLI is present locally at `/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`, version `0.44.1`. The existing `invoke-gemini-analysis.sh` implements dry-run/live artifact output but writes files via shell redirection and logs via older `.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py`; this should be reviewed before treating it as production-grade.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8864:+- Verified local Gemini CLI presence/version and read the existing Gemini invocation script.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8876:+Analyze four external collaboration systems and produce a critical, prioritized improvement proposal for the local Claude-Codex-Gemini collaboration system.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8886:+| 2. Gather source evidence for four projects | complete | Loaded upstream GitHub pages, previous Claude/Codex artifacts, local protocol, Gemini script, and local CLI version. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8889:+| 5. Prioritize integrable patterns | pending | Include Gemini CLI availability and avoid blindly accepting Claude-oriented assumptions. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8921:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8926:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8930:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8935:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8948:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8986:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8993:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8998:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9005:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9010:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9017:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9031:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9083:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9085:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9087:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9089:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9091:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9097:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9102:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9131:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9143:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9148:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9153:+- Gemini receives a prompt plus explicit file list or manifest.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9154:+- Gemini writes no repository files directly.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9157:+- Event types should be explicit: `analysis_requested`, `analysis_completed`, `analysis_failed`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9158:+- Failed Gemini calls must not move task state to generic `in_progress`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9166:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9174:+- `roles.md`: Claude/Codex/Gemini routing.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9177:+- `workflows/gemini-readonly.md`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9190:+- Gemini remains read-only unless the user explicitly authorizes write access and the work is isolated.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9235:+## Gemini CLI Considerations

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9550:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9556:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9561:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9590:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9602:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9607:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9612:+- Gemini receives a prompt plus explicit file list or manifest.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9613:+- Gemini writes no repository files directly.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9616:+- Event types should be explicit: `analysis_requested`, `analysis_completed`, `analysis_failed`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9617:+- Failed Gemini calls must not move task state to generic `in_progress`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9625:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9633:+- `roles.md`: Claude/Codex/Gemini routing.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9636:+- `workflows/gemini-readonly.md`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9649:+- Gemini remains read-only unless the user explicitly authorizes write access and the work is isolated.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9694:+## Gemini CLI Considerations
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9696:+Gemini CLI is installed and versioned locally (`0.44.1`). That makes direct CLI feasible. The right first integration is not "Gemini as a third writer"; it is "Gemini as a large-context read-only analyst whose output is persisted as an artifact."
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9714:+3. Hardened Gemini read-only artifact workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9722:+3. Global `.claude`/`.codex`/`.gemini` sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9742:+- Current roles already describe Claude as orchestrator, Codex as implementer/reviewer/validator, and Gemini as read-only large-context analyst by default.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9754:+- Claude-Team upstream presents a hub-and-spoke model: Claude as the single user entry point, Codex for code implementation/debugging, Gemini for long-context repository/log/document analysis, and setup via MCP servers/templates.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9755:+- cc-use-exp upstream is not a runtime collaboration engine. It is a layered configuration distribution project covering Claude/Gemini/Codex/Cursor rules, skills, commands, templates, sync scripts, managed boundaries, and progressive disclosure.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9757:+- Existing local artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1654-codex-github-projects-analysis.md` already reached similar P0 conclusions: role routing, Gemini read-only artifact workflow, independent analysis protocol, journal validation, and defer full Ralph/MCP/global sync.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9758:+- Existing Claude artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-0848-claude-github-projects-analysis.md` over-prioritized cross-platform skill distribution relative to the current system maturity. That is useful eventually but premature before stronger state validation and minimal Gemini workflow are stable.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9759:+- Gemini CLI is present locally at `/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`, version `0.44.1`. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9792:+- Verified local Gemini CLI presence/version and read the existing Gemini invocation script.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9808:+Analyze four external collaboration systems and produce a critical, prioritized improvement proposal for the local Claude-Codex-Gemini collaboration system.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9818:+| 2. Gather source evidence for four projects | complete | Loaded upstream GitHub pages, previous Claude/Codex artifacts, local protocol, Gemini script, and local CLI version. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9820:+| 4. Identify local system gaps | complete | Compared against current skill project, `.omc/collaboration` protocol, Gemini script, and journal behavior. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9821:+| 5. Prioritize integrable patterns | complete | Prioritized passive state machine, failure context, Gemini read-only workflow, semantic validation, and protocol slicing. |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9844:5. **Gemini CLI 已确认安装可用，版本 `0.44.1`**。建议 P0 以直接 CLI 的只读 artifact workflow 集成，不先做全局配置同步或 MCP。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9846:我没有简单接受 Claude 之前的优先级：Claude 旧方案把“跨平台 skill 分发”排得偏早；我的判断是它应降到 P2。当前更紧急的是强化状态语义、失败记忆和 Gemini 只读边界，否则三 agent 只会放大协作歧义。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9856:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9861:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9865:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9870:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9883:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9921:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9928:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9933:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9940:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9945:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9952:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9966:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10018:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10020:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10022:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10024:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10026:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10032:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10037:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.

High agreement on core priorities. Key consensus: Gemini read-only workflow, independent analysis protocol, journal validation, role routing.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2830:**Gemini Status:** CLI installed (v0.44.1) but API返回500错误。集成暂缓至API恢复。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2865:### Q1: Gemini集成先走直接CLI还是Claude MCP？
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2867:**Codex建议:** 直接CLI (P0)，因为本机Gemini已安装且支持headless；Claude MCP当前未配置。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2872:- Gemini CLI已安装，`-p` headless模式可用
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2873:- MCP需要安装`gemini-mcp-tool`并修改用户级Claude配置
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2877:**决定:** P0使用直接CLI，格式：`gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2881:### Q2: Gemini是否永远只读？
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2883:**Codex建议:** 默认只读。只有用户显式要求Gemini参与改代码时，才用worktree或单独patch artifact。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2888:- Gemini优势在大上下文分析，不在代码生成
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2893:- 默认：Gemini只读，输出artifact到`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2894:- 例外：用户明确要求Gemini改代码时，使用git worktree隔离
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:2895:- 协议明确标注Gemini默认角色为"analyst"，非"implementer"
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:3000:   - Gemini: 只读大上下文分析、长日志/文档/多文件扫描
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:3003:2. **Gemini只读artifact workflow** (Claude P1 + Codex P0 #2)

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:3379:+- Gemini live validation remains unresolved because prior runs reported API 500 failures. A 3-agent pilot is therefore not yet fully testable.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-05-next-steps-critical-discussion-context-p0-i-2026-05-30T09-36-00-947Z.md:3463:+6. **"Gemini integration is P0 complete" is conditional.** Dry-run exists, but live API reliability remains unproven. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3255:| 技能目录 | `.claude/skills/` ✅ | `.gemini/skills/` ✅（v0.24.0+） | `.codex/skills/` → `~/.agents/skills/` | `.cursor/skills/` ✅ |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3256:| 命令目录 | `.claude/commands/` (.md) | `.gemini/commands/` (.toml) | 无独立命令目录，使用显式 workflow skills | `.cursor/commands/` (.md) |
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3261:- Gemini CLI：核心规则在 `GEMINI.md`；详细规范通过 `skills/` 按需激活（v0.24.0+）
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3265:> 如需在多个工具间同步规则（如禁止行尾注释），需分别在 `.claude/rules/bash-style.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md`、`.cursor/rules/bash-style.mdc` 中维护。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3345:# Part 2: Gemini CLI 配置（前端设计）
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3347:> 📖 **[完整指南](./docs/guides/gemini-cli.md)** - 前端场景速查、UI 风格约束、Vue 组件规范、MCP 工具使用
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3350:<img src="pic/cli-gemini-cli.svg" alt="Gemini CLI 加载机制 + cc-use-exp 介入链路" width="100%" style="max-width: 1000px" />
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3353:> 上图展示从 `gemini` 命令输入到 Gemini 3 模型输出的完整链路：① `GEMINI.md` 分层拼接（Global → Project → 子目录 JIT），通过 `@import` 注入 cc-use-exp 的 5 个 rules 文件；② Agent Skills（v0.24+）调用 `activate_skill` 工具弹确认后加载完整 SKILL.md；③ TOML Commands（如 `/layout`）和 Extensions（context7、chrome-devtools-mcp）显式介入。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:5901:  > "Can Gemini help with large-context analysis here?"
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:5924:  - Decide when to call Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:5927:- **Gemini (`gemini-cli` mcp tool)** – large-context analyst
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:5930:Think independently. Gemini is an advisor, not an authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:5941:   - If many files / papers / logs are involved, **call Gemini** for a global view.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:5948:     - For many runs / long logs / big tables, **call Gemini** to find patterns and suggest ablations.
